title: Razorpay UPI Platform Config
description: Platform-level configuration for the com.razorpay.upi_circle payment handler (UPI Circle flow). Declared in the platform's UCP profile.

environment.description: Razorpay API environment. Must match the business config environment ('sandbox' for test mode, 'production' for live mode).

upi_apps.description: UPI apps the platform is capable of deep-linking to (e.g., ['gpay', 'phonepe', 'paytm', 'bhim']).
